name: Cloudflare Directory Traversal Evasion Variants Pack
summary: Detects encoded and mixed-encoding path traversal bypass attempts including percent-encoding, double-encoding, and backslash normalization evasions.
objective: Improve detection of traversal payload variants that evade naive ../ matching by leveraging URI decoding and normalization-aware expressions.
risk_mitigated: Unauthorized file access via path traversal
Traversal bypass through encoded dot segments
Windows separator and mixed-normalization bypass attempts

rules.description: Encoded traversal sequences in URI path or query (single-encoding variants such as %2e%2e%2f, %2e%2e/)
rules.expression: (lower(url.path) contains "%2e%2e%2f") or (lower(url.path) contains "%2e%2e/") or (lower(url.query) contains "%2e%2e%2f") or (lower(url.query) contains "%2e%2e/")
(lower(url.path) contains "%252e%252e%252f") or (lower(url.query) contains "%252e%252e%252f") or (lower(url.path) contains "%255c") or (lower(url.query) contains "%255c")

rules.description: Backslash and mixed separator traversal attempts (Windows-style and normalization bypass patterns)
rules.expression: (lower(url.path) contains "..\\") or (lower(url.path) contains "..%5c") or (lower(url.query) contains "..\\") or (lower(url.query) contains "..%5c")

rules.description: Normalized traversal in decoded URI path

tuning_notes: Start in log mode globally for at least 7 days and review by endpoint, user agent, and source ASN.
If static/CDN asset paths include encoded characters by design, carve out known-safe prefixes (for example: /static/, /assets/, /content/) before enforcing challenge/block.
Exclude trusted internal scanners and synthetic monitoring IPs to avoid noisy detections.
Promote only high-confidence rules (double-encoding and backslash variants) to managed_challenge first, then block after validation.
deployment_notes: Deploy in production-like staging with mirrored traffic and WAF event logging enabled.
Validate that no application routes intentionally use dot-segment-like encoded path components.
Roll out in phases: log -> managed_challenge -> block, with rollback triggers tied to 4xx anomaly spikes and synthetic test failures.
Track hit rate by rule ID to determine which expressions can be safely tightened or exempted per application surface.
monitoring_guidance: Alert on sudden increases in cf-dt-ev-002 and cf-dt-ev-003 from single IPs or narrow ASNs.
Correlate traversal detections with origin 403/404 spikes and sensitive file request patterns.
Review challenged requests for credentialed sessions to identify possible account takeover plus post-auth traversal behavior.
